name: Live☆Twin Ki-sikil
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｌｉｖｅ☆Ｔｗｉｎ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ライブツイン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> キスキル
desc: Each time an opponent's monster declares an attack, you gain 500 LP. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and you control no other monsters: You can Special Summon 1 "Lil-la" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Live☆Twin Ki-sikil" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Each time an opponent's monster declares an attack, you gain 500 LP. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and you control no other monsters: You can Special Summon 1 "Lil-la" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Live☆Twin Ki-sikil" once per turn.
eff: Each time an opponent's monster declares an attack, you gain 500 LP. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and you control no other monsters: You can Special Summon 1 "Lil-la" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Live☆Twin Ki-sikil" once per turn.

misc: Requires control of no other monsters
